report.summary: EOD v13 cycle-close (Mar 16): Day 42 publish shipped 5 pages (chain-abstraction, prediction-markets, compound, curve, ai-depin), 4 build fixes landed (WhaleWatch, SentimentHeatmap, MarketRecap, RiskScore client splits), TS errors down from 57 to 40 (all in structured-data.examples.ts), PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items (smart-wallets missing page.tsx — blocker), rate limiter still 0/6 routes active.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Day 42 publish (cb65a9d): 5 pages promoted — /learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026, /ecosystem/compound, /ecosystem/curve, /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide. All page.tsx files confirmed present ✓

Build fixes this cycle: 4 commits — WhaleWatchClient.tsx added (aa190c8), 4 client/metadata splits (538e7e4), MarketRecap client/server split + apostrophe fix (e36d391), ecosystem + courses route fix + stargate JSX (1b4a15e). All client components verified present ✓

TypeScript: 40 errors, all in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file). Down from 57 in previous EOD — improvement from ecosystem/courses cleanup. ignoreBuildErrors: true — non-blocking for Vercel builds.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026 (MISSING page.tsx — blocker) and /learn/mev-protection-guide (page.tsx present ✓). smart-wallets cannot be promoted until page is created.
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 481 slugs total. Massive expansion this cycle (Days 16-42 bulk addition in cb65a9d). Direct page.tsx coverage good for recently promoted pages.
New page /learn/payfi-guide added to PUBLISHED_PAGES and page.tsx confirmed present ✓

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60 stale-while-revalidate=120, stale cache fallback on error ✓
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600 stale-while-revalidate=1200, stale cache fallback only (no hardcoded fallback) ⚠
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, stale cache fallback only ⚠
/api/market-metrics — Aggregated (fear-greed + prices + gas), 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation, FULL hardcoded fallback data ✓
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, FULL FALLBACK_DATA constant ✓
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via src/lib/defillama.ts, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, error response only (no fallback) ⚠
PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() from src/lib/rate-limiter.ts NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes. 9th consecutive cycle flagged. Token bucket implementation exists but is unused.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Latest commit: cb65a9d (Day 42 publish — 5 pages promoted). This is the HEAD that should be deployed to Vercel.
next.config.ts: output=standalone, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true — all production-safe settings confirmed ✓
Security headers: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy set in next.config.ts. Middleware adds X-Robots-Tag for noindex pages ✓
Static asset caching: /_next/static/* set to max-age=31536000 immutable ✓
Vercel project config: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 / team_crOFt5ZIDYkZ8TXrZubTK8qj — present in .vercel/project.json ✓
Sandbox build: Cannot run full build in VM (memory-constrained). Vercel builds with 8GB headroom and ignoreBuildErrors=true.
CARRY-OVER: Verify Vercel dashboard shows latest deployment from cb65a9d is Ready/Current. Previous standup flagged git index.lock issue — check if resolved.

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Day 42 publish — 5 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (chain-abstraction, prediction-markets, compound, curve, ai-depin-crypto). Commit cb65a9d.
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 4 build fixes — client/server component splits for WhaleWatch, SentimentHeatmap, MarketRecap, RiskScore. Apostrophe syntax errors fixed. Ecosystem + courses route fix landed.
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: TS error count reduced from 57 → 40 (cleanup of deleted ecosystem pages removed error sources).
CARRY-OVER: /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026 in PUBLISH_QUEUE but page.tsx missing — BLOCKER for next publish batch. Programmer needs to create this page before Day 44 promotion.

CARRY-OVER: Rate limiter integration (9th consecutive cycle flagged). checkRateLimit() exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but is applied to 0/6 public API routes. Recommend scheduling as a focused sprint task.
CARRY-OVER: structured-data.examples.ts has 40 TS errors (JSX in .ts file). Quick fix: rename to .tsx. Non-blocking but clutters error output.
CARRY-OVER: defi-yields route lacks in-memory cache layer (only HTTP caching). Should be aligned with the other 5 routes.
CARRY-OVER: git index.lock issue flagged in standup-v14 — verify resolved before next commit cycle.
FOMC: Wednesday Mar 18 — community team has FOMC prep tweets drafted (per standup-v14).
